programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: When a suspect makes it clear he's not stopping for anyone, it's up to K9 Murphy's speed and determination to bring the chase to an end; K9 Bear's bomb-detection training is suddenly put to the test when explosives detonate in the middle of the night; after eluding police for weeks, a naked fugitive is on the run again; K9 Eddie is called in, and the pursuit ends exactly as his training predicts; and K9 Red barrels into action after a suspect crashes into a police cruiser and then tears off.
